abilities.description: When you summon a flock of crows and ask a single question, roll +wits. On a strong hit, you interpret their calls as a helpful omen. Envision the response (@Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.bd6278f18bbd6739]{Ask the Oracle} if unsure) and take +2 momentum. On a weak hit, the crows ignore your question and offer a clue to an unrelated problem or opportunity in this area. Envision what you learn (@Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.bd6278f18bbd6739]{Ask the Oracle} if unsure), and take +1 momentum.

As above, and the crows will also help guide you on the proper path. On a hit, add +1 on the next segment when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Set a Course}.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
